task_completion.description: Verify the document has the correct title, header, and footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the prominent title 'NEUROPSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION REPORT' in the main body. Check the top margin for a header reading 'CONFIDENTIAL PROTECTED HEALTH INFORMATION' and the bottom margin for a footer containing 'MRN: 8492-491' and page numbers.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a demographic header block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a block of patient demographic information (e.g., Name, DOB, Date of Exam) at the beginning of the report, just below the header/title.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is organized into the eight required clinical sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct headings matching exactly: 'Reason for Referral', 'Background and History', 'Behavioral Observations', 'Tests Administered', 'Test Results', 'Summary and Impressions', 'Diagnostic Impressions', and 'Recommendations'.

task_completion.description: Verify that dictation meta-notes have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the document text to ensure there are no conversational dictation instructions (e.g., 'typist note', 'new paragraph', 'make a table') left in the clinical report.

task_completion.description: Verify the Test Results section contains a properly formatted table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Test Results' section, look for a visual grid/table containing the WAIS-IV, WMS-IV, and Trail Making Test scores. The table must have exactly these five column headers: 'Test Domain', 'Index/Subtest', 'Standard Score', 'Percentile', and 'Qualitative Description'.

task_completion.description: Verify the finalized report is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the word processor's title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file manager window showing the file saved as 'final_neuropsych_eval.docx' inside the '~/Documents/results/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer interface being used to edit the document, rather than just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the table was created using the word processor's table feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for table borders, cell alignments, or the table properties dialog in the word processor, ensuring it is not just text spaced out with tabs or spaces.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively formatted the document rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of editing, such as deleting meta-notes, inserting headers/footers, or converting text to a table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file must be saved as: /home/ga/Documents/results/final_neuropsych_eval.docx. Required headings: Reason for Referral, Background and History, Behavioral Observations, Tests Administered, Test Results, Summary and Impressions, Diagnostic Impressions, Recommendations. Required table headers: Test Domain, Index/Subtest, Standard Score, Percentile, Qualitative Description. Header text must be exactly 'CONFIDENTIAL PROTECTED HEALTH INFORMATION'. Footer text must contain 'MRN: 8492-491'.
